title: [W5] PG — .github/workflows/release.yml（[release] commit 觸發 CI/CD）
instruction:
[WORKTREE] dispatch 建立 .worktrees/T-eztcomm-20260601-W5-PG-2 + branch feat/T-eztcomm-20260601-W5-PG-2

[WISH] W-eztcomm-20260601-REBUILD

## 目標
依 devops.md §2 規格，建立 .github/workflows/release.yml，在 commit message 含 [release] 時自動執行：docker build → push Artifact Registry → Cloud Run deploy → EF migration。

## 上游依賴
- T-eztcomm-20260601-W5-AT-1：devops.md §2 CI/CD workflow 規格
- T-eztcomm-20260601-W5-PG-1：Dockerfile 已就緒

## release.yml 完整內容

```yaml
name: Release to Cloud Run

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  release:
    name: Build and Deploy
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    # 只在 commit message 含 [release] 時執行
    if: contains(github.event.head_commit.message, '[release]')

    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write

    env:
      PROJECT_ID: eztravel-community-prod
      REGION: asia-east1
      SERVICE: eztravel-community
      REPO: eztcomm-repo
      IMAGE: asia-east1-docker.pkg.dev/eztravel-community-prod/eztcomm-repo/eztravel-community

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Authenticate to GCP
        uses: google-github-actions/auth@v2
        with:
          credentials_json: ${{ secrets.GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS }}

      - name: Set up gcloud
        uses: google-github-actions/setup-gcloud@v2

      - name: Configure Docker for Artifact Registry
        run: gcloud auth configure-docker ${{ env.REGION }}-docker.pkg.dev --quiet

      - name: Build and push Docker image
        run: |
          docker build -t ${{ env.IMAGE }}:${{ github.sha }} -t ${{ env.IMAGE }}:latest .
          docker push ${{ env.IMAGE }}:${{ github.sha }}
          docker push ${{ env.IMAGE }}:latest

      - name: Deploy to Cloud Run
        run: |
          gcloud run deploy ${{ env.SERVICE }} \
            --image=${{ env.IMAGE }}:${{ github.sha }} \
            --region=${{ env.REGION }} \
            --platform=managed \
            --allow-unauthenticated \
            --add-cloudsql-instances=${{ env.PROJECT_ID }}:${{ env.REGION }}:eztcomm-db \
            --service-account=eztcomm-runner@${{ env.PROJECT_ID }}.iam.gserviceaccount.com \
            --set-secrets=DB_CONNECTION_STRING=eztcomm-db-connection:latest \
            --memory=512Mi --cpu=1 \
            --min-instances=0 --max-instances=3 \
            --quiet
```

## GitHub Secrets 文件（在 wiki_draft 中說明）
需在 GitHub repo Settings → Secrets 設定：
- `GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS`：GCP service account JSON（eztcomm-runner SA，有 Cloud Run Admin + Artifact Registry Writer + Cloud SQL Client 權限）

## 完工自驗
1. `cat .github/workflows/release.yml` → 含 "if: contains(github.event.head_commit.message, '[release]')" 
2. yaml 語法驗證：`python -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/release.yml'))"` → 無 exception

## 產出
- .github/workflows/release.yml
- wiki_draft: .agent_system/cards/T-eztcomm-20260601-W5-PG-2/T-eztcomm-20260601-W5-PG-2_pg_draft.md（含 GitHub Secrets 設定說明）
